description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized crizotinib for the treatment of pediatric patients (age >= 1 to < 18 years) with recurrent or refractory anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK)-positive unresectable inflammatory myofibroblastic tumor (IMT).

indication.indication: XALKORI as monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of paediatric patients (age >= 1 to <18 years) with recurrent or refractory anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK)-positive unresectable inflammatory myofibroblastic tumour (IMT).
